title: 6 scp Commands for Simple Remote File Transfer
summary: Move files between local and remote machines with scp commands for uploads, downloads, recursive copies, custom ports, and key-based transfers.
verification_setup: Replace the example hosts, users, key paths, ports, and file paths before running the commands.
Use only real hosts and destinations you are allowed to access.
verification_command: Manual verification only; run the commands from src/scp_commands_for_simple_remote_file_transfer.sh with real hosts, files, and credentials.
verification_notes: Manual verification only. Replace the example hosts, paths, and credentials with targets you are allowed to access.
